mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE ( trace_id, line_id, family_id, app_id, api_total_data, deducted_total_bytes, api_remaining_data, final_status, last_lua_status, created_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{done.traceId}, #{done.lineId}, #{done.familyId}, #{done.appId}, #{done.apiTotalData}, #{done.deductedTotalBytes}, #{done.apiRemainingData}, #{done.finalStatus}, #{done.lastLuaStatus}, #{done.createdAt}, #{done.finishedAt} )
